mission.title: Install and Use Score for Kubernetes Workload Deployment
mission.description: Score is a developer-centric, platform-agnostic workload specification. The score-k8s CLI translates Score YAML into Kubernetes manifests, letting you define workloads once and deploy across environments. Score is a client-side CLI tool — it does not run inside your cluster.

steps.title: Install Score CLI
steps.description:
Install the Score CLI:
```bash
# macOS
brew install score-spec/tap/score-compose
brew install score-spec/tap/score-k8s

# Linux
curl -Lo score-compose https://github.com/score-spec/score-compose/releases/latest/download/score-compose-linux-amd64
curl -Lo score-k8s https://github.com/score-spec/score-k8s/releases/latest/download/score-k8s-linux-amd64
chmod +x score-compose score-k8s
sudo mv score-compose score-k8s /usr/local/bin/
```

steps.title: Create a Score workload
steps.description:
Create a `score.yaml` workload definition:
```bash
cat > score.yaml << 'EOF'
apiVersion: score.dev/v1b1
metadata:
  name: hello-world
containers:
  main:
    image: nginx:1.25
    ports:
      http:
        port: 80
EOF
```

steps.title: Generate Kubernetes manifests
steps.description:
Convert the Score file to Kubernetes YAML:
```bash
score-k8s init
score-k8s generate score.yaml
score-k8s deploy
```
Or generate Docker Compose:
```bash
score-compose init
score-compose generate score.yaml
docker compose up -d
```

resolution.summary: Score CLI is installed for platform-agnostic workload definitions that generate Docker Compose or Kubernetes manifests.

uninstall.title: Remove Score CLI
uninstall.description:
```bash
sudo rm /usr/local/bin/score-compose /usr/local/bin/score-k8s
# Or: brew uninstall score-compose score-k8s
```

troubleshooting.title: Generated manifests missing resources
troubleshooting.description: Score translates workloads — complex resources may need manual customization after generation.

troubleshooting.title: score-k8s deploy fails
troubleshooting.description:
Ensure kubectl is configured:
```bash
kubectl cluster-info
```

prerequisites.description: No Kubernetes cluster required for Score CLI. kubectl needed for score-k8s deployments.
